description:
You are the Quality Assurance Manager at a pharmaceutical distribution center. Vendor 'MedSource Pharma' is under a regulatory recall. Navigate to their contact record in the Contacts app and read the recall notice in their internal notes to determine the affected date range and replacement vendor.

Then review all product lots in the Inventory app. Each lot's description includes its source vendor and receipt date. Identify lots that are both from MedSource Pharma AND received within the recall date range.

Create a sub-location 'Quarantine - Regulatory Hold' under WH/Stock. Transfer all affected lot quantities to this quarantine location via internal transfer(s).

Finally, create a single confirmed Purchase Order from the replacement vendor (specified in the recall notice) for the total quarantined quantity of each affected product.

Do NOT quarantine lots from MedSource received outside the recall window. Do NOT quarantine lots from other vendors. Do NOT touch products never supplied by MedSource Pharma.
